items.name: awesome-copilot-chatmodes
items.description: Custom chatMode.md personas for GitHub Copilot — specialize your VS Code with AI assistants for testing, security, clean‑code refactoring, dashboards, prompt design, and more. Just drop in and select your mode.

items.name: antigravity-workflows
items.description: Community-driven workflows for Antigravity AI. Like Claude Skills - reusable prompts and automation for AI coding assistants.

items.name: prompt-manager
items.description: TUI tool to manage prompts from AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Aider, Amp, Gemini)

items.name: windbg-ext-mcp
items.description: WinDbg-ext-MCP bridges your favorite LLM client (like Cursor, Claude, or VS Code) with WinDbg, enabling real-time, AI assisted kernel debugging. Write prompts in your AI coding assistant and receive instant, context-aware analysis and insights from your live kernel debugging session.

items.name: lucidity-mcp
items.description: AI-powered code quality analysis using MCP to help AI assistants review code more effectively. Analyze git changes for complexity, security issues, and more through structured prompts.

items.name: Context-Engineering
items.description: 🚀 A framework for Context Engineering using Google Gemini. Move beyond simple prompting and learn to systematically provide context to your AI coding assistant for more reliable, consistent, and complex software development.

items.name: spec-driven-workflow
items.description: Lightweight markdown-based workflow for collaborating with AI coding assistants using spec-driven development methodology

items.name: GPT_Keylogger
items.description: This is the official repository for the code used in the paper: "What Was Your Prompt? A Remote Keylogging Attack on AI Assistants", USENIX Security 24'

items.name: ai_coding_project_base
items.description: A structured prompt framework for building software products with AI coding assistants. This toolkit guides you through product specification, technical design, and implementation planning—producing documents that AI agents can execute against.

items.name: ai-ddd-prompts-and-rules
items.description: DDD-related prompts and rules to use with your favourite coding assistants

items.name: awesome-vibe-coding
items.description: A curated list of vibe coding assistants, IDEs, tools and references for learning how to efficently collaborate with AI to write code. Best practices of prompt enginnering for developers. AI-powered tools for coding and UX/UI design. Our focus is on tools that allow for generating code or designs using natural language prompts.

items.name: prompts
items.description: Curated collection of AI prompts for MATLAB development - enhance your workflow with MATLAB Copilot, GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, and other AI coding assistants. Includes prompts for Live Scripts, signal processing, machine learning, control systems, and more.

items.name: prompt-registry
items.description: VS Code extension for managing, sharing, and installing AI prompt collections for GitHub Copilot and other AI assistants

items.name: mcp-watchdog
items.description: MCP security proxy that sits between AI coding assistants and MCP servers, detecting and blocking all known MCP attack classes. Works with any MCP server (tools, resources, prompts) on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

items.name: clojure-system-prompt
items.description: A system prompt for LLM coding assistants working with Clojure. Optimized for REPL-driven development, idiomatic functional code, and the unique challenges niche languages face with AI assistance.

items.name: CodeRanedeer
items.description: GPT-4 (prompt) AI assists in writing, fixing, or reviewing code by providing suggestions, guidance, and explanations. It can also serve as a pair programming buddy to enhance your coding experience and help create or explain tasks.

items.name: DeepStream_Coding_Agent
items.description: A project showcasing how to leverage AI coding assistants (Cursor, Claude Code, etc.) for accelerated NVIDIA DeepStream SDK application development using a curated agentic skill and structured prompts.

items.name: github-copilot
items.description: Organizational baseline configuration for GitHub Copilot with standardized chat modes, instructions, and prompts for AB-Lindex development teams. Includes specialized AI assistants, coding guidelines, and reusable templates to enhance developer productivity and ensure consistent AI-assisted development practices.

items.name: watsonx-code-assistant-for-ansible
items.description: IBM watsonx Code Assistant for Red Hat Ansible Lightspeed demystifies the process of Ansible Playbook creation through generative AI-powered content recommendations. This repository contains sample end-to-end demos, guidelines for best prompting practices, and guidelines for model customization.

items.name: OWASP-AI-Security-Prompts
items.description: AI prompts that teach Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor to identify and fix OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities in code. Transform any AI assistant into a security focused code reviewer.

items.name: mcp-tools-py
items.description: MCP server providing code quality checks (pylint and pytest) with smart LLM-friendly prompts for analysis and fixes. Enables Claude and other AI assistants to analyze your code and suggest improvements.

items.name: prompt-tower.nvim
items.description: ⚡ Turn your codebase into AI-ready context in seconds – the Neovim plugin that bridges the gap between your code and AI assistants. Select files, generate structured prompts, and feed your entire project to Claude/ChatGPT/Cursor with zero friction.

items.name: xperience-by-kentico-kenticopilot
items.description: AI agent prompts and instructions for Xperience by Kentico development. This repository provides pre-configured prompts for common development tasks, helping developers accelerate their workflow with AI coding assistants.

items.name: AssistantAI
items.description: A Sublime Text plugin to interact with HTTP API endpoints and perform text manipulation with their responses. Bundled with OpenAI to interact with ChatGPT or Codex, Gitea to create Issues from the selected code, and Python prompts to add Docstrings, and more. Users can extend it's features by defining Servers and Prompts in Sublime JSON files.

items.name: mcp-confluence
items.description: This repository contains the source code for a confluence context server, it provides prompts that can be used as slash commands for clients like Zed Editor, in order to add page contents as context to the AI assistant.

items.name: codex-belya
items.description: Codex Belya is an AI voice assistant for Codex (Iron Man's Jarvis experience). It helps you chat with Codex about your code, formulate prompts for tasks, and get Codex results verbally. We all talk to our code while coding, so why don't we have someone to talk back?

items.name: Multimodal-voice-assistant
items.description: This project is a multi-modal AI voice assistant that uses LM Studio, OpenAI API or Claude Code, audio processing with WhisperModel, speech recognition, clipboard extraction, and image processing to respond to user prompts.

items.name: engine_context
items.description: Advanced agent rules and prompt templates for AI coding assistants, focused on planning, security, memory-bank documentation, and approval-driven workflows. Designed for use with Claude Code, Cursor, VSCode, GitHub Copilot, WindSurf, TRAE IDE, ZED IDE, and other AI-powered development tools.

items.name: AI-Agents-Boilerplate
items.description: Learn how to create your own self-operating AI agent using Python, the OpenAI API, and ReAct prompts. This step-by-step beginner-friendly guide covers real-time data handling and practical code examples to build an autonomous AI assistant.

items.name: promptscript
items.description: Prompt-as-Code for Enterprise AI. Standardize, audit, and deploy instructions across any AI coding assistant.

items.name: copilot-instructions-unicode-injection
items.description: Proof of Concept (PoC) demonstrating prompt injection vulnerability in AI code assistants (like Copilot) using hidden Unicode characters within instruction files (copilot-instructions.md). Highlights risks of using untrusted instruction templates. For educational/research purposes only.

items.name: PromptyDumpty
items.description: PromptyDumpty is a lightweight, universal package manager for AI coding assistant artifacts (prompts, instructions, rules, workflows, etc.). It lets you install and manage prompt packages across different AI coding assistants like GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, Windsurf, and more.

items.name: prompthistory
items.description: CLI tool to search, replay, test, and compare your AI coding assistant prompts. Supports OpenCode, Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini CLI, and more!

items.name: code-z-cli
items.description: CodeZ CLI  is an interactive, offline first and AI-powered code assistant for your terminal. Features session memory, file reading with syntax highlighting, and a beautiful, customizable interface using Rich and prompt-toolkit. Perfect for developers who want smart code help right in the CLI without internet.

PromptVault is a lightweight yet powerful VS Code extension that helps developers save, organize, and reuse their important prompts directly inside the editor. Whether you’re working with GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q, or any other AI assistant, PromptVault ensures your best prompts are always at your fingertips.

items.name: speakprompt
items.description: A practical solution using Whisper.cpp & Llama.cpp for anyone wanting to convert speech to written text prompts that are clear and better than your original spoken words! Great for prompting CLI AI coding assistants like OpenCode, Droid, and others that might not have voice commands or if you just want to write anything from speech.

items.name: pm-project-brain
items.description: A reusable prompt that helps product managers set up persistent AI context ("project brain") for any AI coding assistant. Run it once, answer the interview questions, and your product knowledge, terminology, writing standards, and key decisions load automatically in every future conversation.
